subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God! The Lord of Utterance declareth: Let not the Bayán become a veil between you and Him, nor turn aside from Him through mere letters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله صاحب بیان میفرماید ببیان از او محتجب ممانید و بحروفات از او اعراض
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
